items.question: Based on the provided text, what is the primary architectural framework being presented?
items.explanation: The text explicitly lists '3 Model Architecture' immediately following the abstract and introduces 'Figure 1: The Transformer - model architecture.' In the context of sequence-to-sequence models described by such paper structures, this framework is classically defined as the Encoder-Decoder architecture.

items.question: What is the formal title given to the specific model architecture depicted in Figure 1?
items.explanation: The caption for Figure 1 in the text explicitly states: 'Figure 1: The Transformer - model architecture.'

items.question: Which section of the paper is dedicated to explaining the structural design of the model?
items.explanation: The text lists the heading '3 Model Architecture', indicating that this section specifically details the design and composition of the model.
